summary: Resy provider ported from omarshahine/restaurant-cli (TypeScript) to a Go internal/source/resy/ package, then wired through the existing book/cancel/goat/earliest/watch/drift/restaurants-list/restaurants-get commands so Resy is a full third network alongside OpenTable + Tock. Post-#445 (location-native-redesign) rebase added resy.LocationInput and GeoContext.ForResy() so Resy participates in the same typed-GeoContext pipeline as OpenTable and Tock.
reason: The CLI was originally framed as "OpenTable + Tock unified" because the restaurant-cli upstream had not yet stabilized a Resy book flow. Resy covers the third pillar of US fine-dining (Carbone, Le Bernardin, Atomix, Roberta's, etc.) and has a clean public API behind a shared hardcoded api_key, so the cost to add it is low and the value to agents is high — "find a table" queries that ignore Resy systematically miss the venues most likely to have hot reservations. Resy uses bearer-style token auth (not cookies), so the on-disk Session grows a ResyAuth struct alongside the existing OT/Tock cookie slices. The two-step book flow (POST /3/details JSON → POST /3/book form-encoded with struct_payment_method as a JSON-stringified form value) is identical to the TS reference; the Go port preserves it verbatim because Resy's own web client behaves the same way.
validated_outcome: go build ./... and go vet ./... clean. go test ./... PASS across all packages (cli, cliutil, mcp, source/auth, source/opentable, source/resy, source/tock, store). 28+ unit tests under internal/source/resy/ cover header building, body encoding distinctions (JSON for /3/details vs form-encoded for /3/book), HTTP error mapping (401/419 → ErrAuthExpired, 410 → ErrSlotTaken), search/availability/reservations parsing, payment-method selection, isSlotTakenMessage classifier, and strict id match on VenueIdentityByID. Post-#445 rebase additions: (a) VenueIdentityProbe walks 5 forward dates (1/3/7/14/30 days) to fix the live-confirmed false-negative on `restaurants get resy:1387` where /4/find returns empty venues lists for venues that demonstrably exist on Resy and have slots on adjacent dates. (b) cancel disambiguates auth_expired vs invalid_reservation by probing Whoami when /3/cancel returns 401/419 — only fires on the error path, no happy-path latency cost. (c) docs nits: watch parent + restaurants list long description + goat short/long + restaurants short all mention Resy. (d) resy.LocationInput struct (City + Lat/Lng, Resy two/three-letter city codes) added to internal/source/resy/types.go. (e) GeoContext.ForResy() method on internal/cli/geo_context.go projects the resolved GeoContext into resy.LocationInput, mirroring the existing ForOpenTable() and ForTock() shapes. (f) goatQueryResy signature changed to accept *GeoContext so the Resy fanout in goat and restaurants list shares the same typed location surface as OpenTable and Tock.
upstream_tracking: mvanhorn/printing-press-library#445 (location-native-redesign merged before this PR landed; this entry's GeoContext.ForResy() / resy.LocationInput additions extend that surface to Resy)
